title: hupeiko #5226
definition:
1) to resist no longer, but to give way, yield (of combatants)
 2) metaph. to yield to authority and admonition, to submit
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to resist no longer, but to give way, yield (of combatants)
 2) metaph. to yield to authority and admonition, to submit

    NASB:  to retire, withdraw, submit:
